summary: Approved/current, HUMAN_CONFIRMED: primary goal is enzyme activity prediction (ART-CHARTER). Use EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 (ART-DATA); primary metric macro AUROC with protein family as the statistical unit (ART-METRIC); formal seeds 7, 21, 42 (ART-SEEDS); and baseline ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee (ART-BASELINE). Governance: 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100, protect data/raw, and stop when the budget is exhausted or after more than 2 NaN failures (ART-GOVERNANCE). Explicitly rejected as project scope/non-goal: protein structure generation (ART-CHARTER). No deprecated alternatives were supplied.
